error_message: Given output_size=(4, 5), kernel_size=(1, 1), dilation=(1, 1), padding=(0, 0), stride=(1, 1), expected size of input's dimension 2 to match the calculated number of sliding blocks 4 * 5 = 20, but got input.size(2)=12.
